attacking_style: No attacking pattern observable; 2017 observations show a rider in decline, unable to initiate or follow decisive moves in Monument finales.
team_tactics: Quickstep deployed risky all-leader group composition at Ronde, suggesting they lacked confidence in Boonen as sole protected rider and hedged bets with multiple captains.
terrain_preference: Historically suited to cobbles (four-time Roubaix champion), but 2017 shows this advantage completely eroded. No terrain now provides competitive edge.
vulnerability: Late-race positioning errors (Oman crash in final kilometers), mechanical vulnerability (Ronde), and inability to compete in Monument finales despite cobbled pedigree.
key_patterns: Declined competitive capacity in Monument finales: 13th at Roubaix, neutralized at Ronde (2 races)
Positioning and execution errors in critical race moments: crash and mechanical incidents (2 races)
Age-related degradation particularly severe on cobbled specialist profile compared to other Monument types
form_trajectory: negative: All three 2017 observations show decline—mechanical at Ronde, crash at Oman, 13th at final Roubaix confirms end of Monument competitiveness
